Class BeliefEntry

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.reporter.BeliefEntry
public class BeliefEntry extends Object
Represents a unique belief entry of a node regarding a transaction in a simulation.

Each BeliefEntry object encapsulates:

  • simID – the simulation identifier.
  • txID – the transaction identifier.
  • time – the simulation time (in milliseconds) at which the belief was recorded.

Instances of this class are immutable; all fields are final and set during construction. This immutability ensures that the object can be safely used as a key in hash-based collections such as HashMap or HashSet.

The equals(Object) and hashCode() methods are overridden to provide value-based equality, meaning two BeliefEntry objects are considered equal if they have the same simID, txID, and time.

The toString() method produces a human-readable representation in the format: 

 (simID, txID, time)
See Also:
  • Reporter
  • BeliefEntryCounter

      public BeliefEntry(int simID, long txID, long time)

      simID - the simulation identifier

  • Method Details

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

      Two BeliefEntry objects are equal if and only if they have the same simID, txID, and time.

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the reference object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is equal to the given object, false otherwise
